description: Fried or baked ring-shaped or filled sweet pastries commonly glazed, sugared, or frosted.
preparation_steps: Bake, chill, or fry depending on style

health_advice.benefits: Enjoyable as an occasional treat and can contribute comfort, variety, and some energy.
health_advice.risks: Portion size, sugar, and rich ingredients can make it calorie-dense when eaten often.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Enjoy moderate portions and balance richer desserts with lighter meals through the day.

dietary_notes.note: Ingredients vary, but many common versions contain dairy or egg
